days.saints_uk: Тиждень 2-ий по Зісланні Святого Духа.; Святого мученика Юстина, філософа, і тих, що з ним
days.saints_en: Monday of the Holy Spirit. St. Martyr Justin the Philosopher, and those with him
days.troparion_en: Blessed are You O Christ Our God / You have revealed the fishermen as most wise / by sending down upon them the Holy Spirit / through them You drew the world into Your net / O Lover of Man, Glory to Y

days.saints_uk: Святого отця нашого Никифора, ісповідника
days.saints_en: St. Nicephorus the Confessor
days.troparion_en: Through your inspired confession, / you gained victory for the Church, holy Hierarch Nicephorus. / You suffered unjust exile / because of your reverence for the icon of God the Word. / Righteous Fathe

days.saints_uk: Святого мученика Лукиліяна і тих, що з ним
days.saints_en: St. Martyr Lucillian and those with him
days.troparion_en: By your faith, you shone like a radiant star in the dark night of error; / you fought the good fight and slew the crafty enemy, O Lucillian. / Together with venerable Paula and the four martyred child

days.saints_uk: 🕀 Торжественне поклоніння пречистим Тайнам Тіла і Крови Господа нашого Ісуса Христа; Святого отця нашого Митрофана, патріарха Царгородського
days.saints_en: St. Metrophanes, Patriarch of Constantinople
days.troparion_en: In truth you were revealed to your flock as a rule of faith, / an image of humility and a teacher of abstinence; / your humility exalted you; your poverty enriched you. / Hierarch Father Metrophanes,

days.saints_uk: Святого священномученика Доротея, єпископа Тирського; Святого мученика Косми, пресвітера вірменського
days.saints_en: Hieromartyr Dorotheus, Bishop of Tyre. St. Martyr Cosmas, Armenian Presbyter
days.troparion_en: O Dorotheus, wise hierarch of Christ, / you received the light of wisdom as a gift from the Father of lights. / You increased the talents given to you / and in your old age contested beyond the bounds

days.saints_uk: Преподобного отця нашого Висаріона, чудотворця; Преподобного Іларіона Нового, ігумена Далматської обителі, ісповідника
days.saints_en: Ven. Bessarion the Wonderworker. Ven. Hilarion the New, Hegumen of the Dalmatian Monastery, Confessor
days.troparion_en: O God of our Fathers, / always act with kindness towards us; / take not Your mercy from us, / but guide our lives in peace / through the prayers of the venerable Bessarion and Hilarion the New.

days.saints_uk: Неділя 2-га по Зісланні Святого Духа.; Всіх святих українського народу. Глас 1. Єв. 2.; Св. священномученика Теодота (Богдана), єпископа Анкирського
days.saints_en: 1st Sunday after Pentecost. Sunday of All Saints. Hieromartyr Theodotus (Bohdan), Bishop of Ancyra
days.troparion_en: Adorned in the blood of Your Martyrs throughout all the world,  / as if clothed in purple and linen, /  through them Your Church cries out to You, O Christ God:  / “Bestow Your bounties upon Your peop

days.saints_uk: Тиждень 3-ій по Зісланні Святого Духа.; 🕃 Перенесення мощів святого великомученика Теодора Тирона
days.saints_en: Translation of the Relics of St. Great Martyr Theodore Tyro
days.troparion_en: Truly enlisted with the King of Heaven, / you became an outstanding general for Him, passion-bearer Theodore; / you armed yourself wisely with the weapons of faith / and  conquered hordes of demons, r

days.saints_uk: 🕃 Святого отця нашого Кирила, архиєпископа Олександрійського
days.saints_en: St. Cyril, Archbishop of Alexandria
days.troparion_en: With all reverence let us praise a light of the world, / the great orator and champion of the Mother of God. / For by his fiery teachings / he burned up the heresy of Nestorius; / therefore, let us cr

days.saints_uk: Святого священномученика Тимотея, єпископа Пруського
days.saints_en: Hieromartyr Timothy, Bishop of Prusa
days.troparion_en: By sharing in the ways of the Apostles, /  you became a successor to their throne.  /  Through the practice of virtue,  /  you found the way to divine contemplation, O divinely inspired one; /  by rig

days.saints_uk: 🕂 Свв. апостолів Вартоломея й Варнави
days.saints_en: Solemn Veneration of the Most Pure Mysteries of the Body and Blood of our Lord Jesus Christ. Sts. Apostles Bartholomew & Barnabas
days.troparion_en: Holy Apostles Bartholomew and Barnabas, / entreat the merciful God / to grant our souls forgiveness of transgressions.

days.saints_uk: 🕀 Празник Найсолодшого Господа Бога і Спаса нашого Ісуса Христа; 🕃 Преподобного отця нашого Онуфрія Великого; Преподобного отця нашого Петра Афонського
days.saints_en: Ven. Onuphrius the Great. Ven. Peter of Athos
days.troparion_en: In the flesh you lived the life of the angels, / you were citizens of the desert and treasuries of grace, / O Onuphrius, adornment of Egypt, / and Peter the light of Athos. / Therefore we honor your s

days.saints_uk: Сострадання Пресвятої Богородиці; Святої мучениці Акилини; Святого Трифилія, єпископа Левкусії Кипрської; Преподобного отця нашого Антонія Падуанського
days.saints_en: St. Martyr Aquilina. St. Triphyllius, Bishop of Leucosia in Cyprus. Ven. Anthony of Padua
days.troparion_en: In truth you were revealed to your flock as a rule of faith, / an image of humility and a teacher of abstinence; / your humility exalted you; / your poverty enriched you. / Hierarch Father Triphyllius

days.saints_uk: Неділя 3-тя по Зісланні Святого Духа. Глас 2. Єв. 3.; Святого пророка Єлисея; Святого отця нашого Методія, патріарха Царгородського
days.saints_en: 2nd Sunday after Pentecost. All Saints of the Ukrainian Nation. St. Prophet Elisha. St. Methodius, Patriarch of Constantinople
days.troparion_en: As the bountiful harvest of Your sowing of salvation, / the lands of North America offer to You, O Lord, all the saints who have shone in them. / By their prayers keep the Church and our land in abidi

days.saints_uk: Тиждень 4-ий по Зісланні Святого Духа.; Святого пророка Амоса; Преподобного Єроніма, пресвітера Стридонського
days.saints_en: St. Prophet Amos. Ven. Jerome, Presbyter of Stridon
days.troparion_en: By a flood of tears you made the desert fertile, / and your longing for God brought forth fruits in abundance. / By the radiance of miracles you illumined the whole universe! / O our holy father Jerom

days.saints_uk: Святого отця нашого і чудотворця Тихона Аматунтського
days.saints_en: St. Tychon the Wonderworker of Amathous
days.troparion_en: God called you to the sacred priesthood / as a worthy servant of the Holy Trinity. / You shone forth with the grace of godliness / strengthening the Church by many miracles. / Righteous Tikhon, entrea

days.saints_uk: Святих мучеників Мануїла, Савела й Ісмаїла; Преподобного отця нашого Іпатія, ігумена Руфеніанського
days.saints_en: Sts. Martyrs Manuel, Sabel & Ishmael. Ven. Hypatius, Hegumen of Rufinianum
days.troparion_en: O godly champions and opponents of impiety, divinely-in / spired Manouḗl, wondrous Ishmaḗl, and Sabél,  / you proclaimed Christ, the Son of God courageously, /  and you shed your blood for Him.  / Do

days.saints_uk: Святого мученика Леонтія
days.saints_en: St. Martyr Leontius
days.troparion_en: Your holy martyr Leontius and his companions, O Lord, / through their sufferings have received incorruptible crowns from You, our God. / For having Your strength, they laid low their adversaries, / an

days.saints_uk: 🕂 Святого апостола Юди, брата Господнього
days.saints_en: Feast of the Most Sweet Lord, God and Savior Jesus Christ, Lover of Mankind. St. Apostle Jude, Brother of the Lord
days.troparion_en: Divinely we praise you, O Jude, as a faithful witness, / knowing you to be the brother of Christ. / You trampled on delusion, / and so preserved the faith. / Today as we celebrate your holy memory, /

days.saints_uk: Святого священномученика Методія, єпископа Патарського
days.saints_en: Compassion of the Most Holy Theotokos. Hieromartyr Methodius, Bishop of Patara
days.troparion_en: Your blood cries out to God from the earth like that of Abel, / divinely-wise holy hierarch, Methodius. / You openly preached the Incarnation of God, / putting the heresy of Origen to shame. / You wer

days.saints_uk: Неділя 4-та по Зісланні Святого Духа. Глас 3. Єв. 4.; Святого мученика Юліана Тарсійського
days.saints_en: 3rd Sunday after Pentecost. St. Martyr Julian of Tarsus
days.troparion_en:
(Podoben: “Come, let us worship the Word...”)
Your mother guided you to become a glorious soldier of Christ,  /  and you were clad in the armor of the Spirit,1  /  and entering the contest, you cast

days.saints_uk: Тиждень 5-ий по Зісланні Святого Духа.; Святого священномученика Євсевія, єпископа Самосатського
days.saints_en: Hieromartyr Eusebius, Bishop of Samosata
days.troparion_en: By sharing in the ways of the Apostles,  /  you became a successor to their throne.  /  Through the practice of virtue, you found the way to divine contemplation, O divinely-inspired one:   /  by righ

days.saints_uk: Святої мучениці Агрипіни
days.saints_en: St. Martyr Agrippina
days.troparion_en: Your lamb Agrippina calls out to You, O Jesus, in a loud voice: / "I love You, my Bridegroom, and in seeking You I endure suffering. / In baptism I was crucified so that I might reign in You, / and I

days.saints_uk: 🕀 Різдво чесного і славного пророка, предтечі і хрестителя Господнього Івана
days.saints_en: Nativity of the Honorable and Glorious Prophet, Forerunner and Baptist of the Lord, John
days.troparion_en: Prophet and Forerunner of the coming of Christ, / although we cannot praise you worthily, / we honor you in love at your nativity, / for by it you ended your father’s silence and your mother’s barrenn

days.saints_uk: Святої преподобномучениці Февронії
days.saints_en: Ven. Protomartyr Febronia
days.troparion_en: Your lamb Febronia, calls out to You, O Jesus, in a loud voice: / “I love You, my Bridegroom, and in seeking You I endure suffering. / In baptism I was crucified so that I might reign in You, and I di

days.saints_uk: Преподобного отця нашого Давида, що в Солуні; Блаженного священномученика Андрія Іщака, пресвітера; Блаженних священномученика Миколи Конрада, пресвітера, і мученика Володимира Прийми, співця
days.saints_en: Ven. David of Thessalonica. Blessed Hieromartyr Andrew Ishchak, Presbyter. Blessed Hieromartyr Mykola Konrad, Presbyter, and Martyr Volodymyr Pryima, Cantor
days.troparion_en: The image of God was truly preserved in you, O Father, / for you took up the Cross and followed Christ. / By so doing you taught us to disregard the flesh for it passes away / but to care instead for

days.saints_uk: 🕁 Блаженного священномученика Миколая Чарнецького і двадцяти чотирьох співмучеників; блаженного священномученика Омеляна Ковча; Преподобного отця нашого Сампсона, приятеля подорожніх й убогих
days.saints_en: Blessed Hieromartyr Mykola Charnetsky and Twenty-Four Fellow Martyrs; Blessed Hieromartyr Omelian Kovch. Ven. Sampson the Hospitable
days.troparion_en: Through your patience, your unceasing prayer, your love for the poor and the help you gave to them,  /  you became worthy of your reward, O holy Sampson.  / Intercede with Christ God that He may save

days.saints_uk: Неділя 5-та по Зісланні Святого Духа. Глас 4. Єв. 5.; 🕃 Перенесення мощів святих безсрібників Кира і Івана
days.saints_en: 4th Sunday after Pentecost. Translation of the Relics of Sts. Unmercenaries Cyrus & John
days.troparion_en: O Christ God, / You have given us the miracles of Your martyrs, Cyrus and John, / as an invincible rampart; / through their prayers, frustrate the plans of the heathens, / and strengthen the faith of

days.saints_uk: Тиждень 6-ий по Зісланні Святого Духа.; 🕀 Святих славних і всехвальних первоверховних апостолів Петра й Павла
days.saints_en: Sts. Glorious and All-Praised Chief Apostles Peter & Paul
days.troparion_en: O foremost of the Apostles and teachers of the inhabited earth, /  intercede with the Master of all /  to grant peace to the world and great mercy to our souls.

days.saints_uk: 🕂 Собор святих славних і всехвальних дванадцяти апостолів; Блаженного священномученика Василія Величковського
days.saints_en: Synaxis of the Holy, Glorious and All-Praised Twelve Apostles. Blessed Hieromartyr Vasyl Velychkovsky
days.troparion_en: First-enthroned of the apostles,  / teachers of the universe:  / Entreat the Master of all /  to grant peace to the world,  / and to our souls great mercy!*
